inputs.description: Merged Phase 1 bridge API reused without weakening its source guard.

outputs.change: Adds the ODS-0 UI, environment and mount/path probes, real trusted/foreign bridge runners, bounded timeline, always-visible non-claims banner, and redacted JSON/Markdown diagnosis-pack exports.
Defines all nine DIAGNOSTIC_SUITE §4.2 P0 case IDs in one catalog; BR-003, BR-004, and BR-005 are honestly marked as ODS-1 SKIP runners.
Adds a reproducible Playwright smoke for dev and production preview covering route, navigation gate, catalog, six implemented cases, JSON download/schema, and browser errors.
Adds a Diagnostics navigation entry visible only in Vite DEV; the production direct route retains its research banner.

claims: #/diagnostics loads the ODS-0 studio and #/ods redirects to it.

The Diagnostics sidebar entry is visible in DEV and hidden in production preview; the direct production route remains clearly labeled as a research tool with status_authority NONE and anti-real-world-value non-claims.
All nine P0 IDs from DIAGNOSTIC_SUITE §4.2 are defined in the shared TypeScript catalog.
ODS-ENV-001, ODS-HOST-001, ODS-PATH-001, ODS-PACK-001, ODS-BR-001, and ODS-BR-002 pass in both dev and production-preview browser smoke runs.

ODS-BR-001 invokes the real Nexus iframe adapter and observes the real host bridge accepted receipt. ODS-BR-002 sends from the parent and observes the real local UNTRUSTED_SOURCE receipt with no response posted back.

JSON export downloads a noted.ods-pack/v1 document with status_authority NONE, environment, cases, timeline, bridge, console, storage, security notes, and non-claims fields. Markdown summary export is also present.
Known sk-, xai-, Bearer, and nsec-shaped secrets are redacted from exported JSON and Markdown strings.
non_claims: This is ODS-0, not full ODS-1 or full P0 coverage. ODS-BR-003, ODS-BR-004, and ODS-BR-005 are defined but only record SKIP; npm run ods:p0 was not added or claimed.
This receipt and exported diagnosis packs have status_authority NONE and are not security audits or production-readiness claims.
Phase 2 Agent scrub/import, simulator frame, creature, broker, and Nostr product work were not started.
No real-world value, funds, token, redeem, or economic authorization surface was added.
The diagnosis pack intentionally does not dump IndexedDB contents, localStorage values, Agent history, secrets, or private notes.
npm audit reported 5 dependency findings (1 low, 3 moderate, 1 high); dependency remediation was outside ODS-0 scope.
The receipt is committed after the immutable verified code commit named by verified_at_commit; the receipt-only commit does not alter verified product files.

checks.result: PASS; added and audited 166 packages. npm audit reported 5 known findings.
PASS; Vite transformed 297 modules, produced dist, and pack.js emitted the two single-file HTML artifacts.
PASS; Phase 1 trusted/untrusted bridge regression checks and browser error checks remained green.
PASS in DEV; route, DEV navigation, banner, catalog, six implemented runners, pack download/schema, and zero browser errors.
PASS in production preview; hidden sidebar entry, direct-route banner, catalog, six implemented runners, pack download/schema, and zero browser errors.

limitations: ODS-0 records empty console arrays in the exported pack; the Playwright smoke separately captures and asserts browser console/page errors. Full in-product console capture belongs to ODS-1.
lab_git_head and noted_build_commit are null because no build-time commit injection exists in noted-host yet; the fields remain present and honest.
Storage reporting is schema-shaped metadata only; ODS-0 does not inspect or export workspace records.
The existing local Playwright Chromium cache is used when the package-expected browser revision is absent.
next: NEXT: SEAT-GROK-DRIVE for ODS-0 acceptance. Do not begin Phase 2.
